Caption: Flowchart for determining the cell chemistry identification test boundaries with respective handling decisions and downstream usability diagnosis.

Flow chart of the data driven approach including data generation, training of machine learning algorithms, and testing on synthetical and experimental data on the example of discharging. (a) Varying max. lithium concentration (red lines) and initial SOCs (blue dots). (b) Exemplary generated discharge GITT curves with different starting SOCs. (c) Set of OCV curves from an exemplary data set. (d) Exemplary dV/dQ feature curves. (e) Confusion matrices as performance metrics for different ML models.
